rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Fin. Code §152.101 governs money transmission licensing. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter and have no operative interaction.
quote: A person may not engage in the business of money transmission or advertise, solicit, or hold itself out as engaging in the business of money transmission unless the person is licensed under this chapter.
_note: No conflict: proposed homestead exemption change is unrelated to money transmission licensing statute.
